headline: Bitcoin teeters near $60K as stocks surge 2%

article.title: Bitcoin balances $60K tightrope as US stocks rebound on fresh Iran peace deal hopes
article.summary: Bitcoin faced its own battle for support as US stocks headed higher and analysts warned of a lack of "conviction" among BTC buyers.

headline: Crypto Exchanges Rush to Claim 150M EU Users

article.title: Coinbase, Kraken and OKX move to swoop up EU users affected by MiCA restrictions
article.summary: Several exchanges that have already been authorized by EU regulators are attempting to bring in users from companies unlicensed under the Markets in Crypto-Assets rules, offering transfer bonuses and prizes.

article.title: Microsoft’s $613 Billion Rout Sets Up Its Worst Month Since 2000
article.summary: Microsoft Corp. shares are heading for their worst month in years as investors continue to fret about how the software giant will fare in a world marked by artificial intelligence.

article.title: Morgan Stanley Private Credit Fund Sells $350 Million Bond
article.summary: A Morgan Stanley private credit fund sold investment-grade bonds to refinance debt, its first offering in just over a year.

headline: Crypto Bill Faces 2-Week Deadline Amid Senate Recess

article.title: Clarity Act Enters Critical Two-Week Window as Senate Heads Into Recess

Clarity Act Enters Critical Two-Week Window as Senate Heads Into Recess

headline: Meta AI Breakthrough Sparks $10B Crypto Surge

article.title: Meta Unveils New Tech That Uses AI to Translate Brain Activity Into Text—Without Surgery
article.summary: Meta says its latest Brain2Qwerty system translates brain activity into sentences using non-invasive brain recordings, improving the accuracy of AI-powered neural decoding.

article.title: Bitcoin Is in a Fight at $60K—Here's What the Charts Say
article.summary: BTC kissed $58,800 and bounced. The daily chart is deep in bear territory, and prediction markets are betting on further pain before a rebound.

headline: JPMorgan Warns of $100B Stablecoin Shadow Banking Risk

article.title: JPMorgan execs draw comparison between yield stablecoins and ‘shadow banking’
article.summary: JPMorgan execs argued that stablecoin innovation can easily drift into “shadow banking” if yield payments are permitted.

headline: BNY, Circle Boost USDC With $1B Expansion

article.title: BNY and Circle expand partnership, adding mint and burn capabilities for USDC
article.summary: BNY, the world's largest custodian bank, said it plans to add support for additional stablecoin via its Digital Asset Custody platform.

headline: Fed Governor Cook Reprieve Sends Stocks Up 1%

article.title: Supreme Court blocks Trump from sacking Fed governor Cook
article.summary: Justices say president can fire top regulator in separate decision

headline: Fed Shielded, Markets Surge 300 Points Amid Uncertainty

article.title: Supreme Court protects the Federal Reserve, but what about everybody else?
article.summary: While the central bank’s independence was upheld, other agencies were not so lucky
